## Summary

- what changed:

## Verification

- [ ] `python scripts/verify.py`
- [ ] targeted extra checks, if needed:

## Docs And Compatibility

- [ ] README/docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] changelog updated if the change is release-relevant
- [ ] compatibility notes included for setup, plugins, or integrations

## Risk Review

- [ ] no unconfigured agents/providers were exposed to routing
- [ ] no fragile network-dependent tests were added as default unit tests
- [ ] no public-facing claim exceeds current verification
